nasb.text: If there are still many years, he shall refund part of his purchase price in proportion to them for his own redemption;

esv.text: If there are still many years left, he shall pay proportionately for his redemption some of his sale price.

cnv.text: 如果賣身時還有很多年才到禧年，他就要按著年數，照他賣身的價銀按比例償還他的贖價。

ccb.text: 如果离禧年还有很多年，他就要按比例偿还大部分卖身款为自己赎身。
